teams.name: profile-team
teams.description: Curates a cross-project profile of the entities in your world: drains profile-fact markers into entity profiles at ~/.atl/profiles, each grown through a self-describing, versioned interface.

teams.name: delivery-team
teams.description: Work-item-driven, sprint-based autonomous software delivery on a pluggable backend (Azure DevOps or GitHub): role-agents + ceremony skills orchestrated by atl work dispatch over claude -p workers.

teams.name: personal-advisory-team
teams.description: Your personal advisory team: an honest, wise primary advisor that comes to know you across every conversation and, because it will not flatter you, becomes the one you run to for real thinking.
